Granola.title: Granola
Granola.description: Read your meeting notes and transcripts so the assistant can capture outcomes and commitments. First-party; OAuth on Connect (sees your 'My notes' space).

Zoom.title: Zoom
Zoom.description: Read your Zoom recordings, transcripts, and AI summaries. First-party Zoom MCP; OAuth on Connect.

Fathom.title: Fathom
Fathom.description: Read your Fathom meeting recordings, transcripts, and summaries. First-party; OAuth on Connect.

Fireflies.title: Fireflies
Fireflies.description: Read your Fireflies transcripts, summaries, and action items. First-party; OAuth or API key on Connect.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages and channels so the assistant has your work conversations as context. First-party Slack MCP; OAuth on Connect.
